---
title: "About"
---

# About Me

This website was created for Module 10.

It includes:

- A home page
- A dashboard
- An essay on Shiny apps
- An essay on Shinylive

## Purpose

The purpose of this project is to demonstrate my understanding of how to share outputs with an audience using Quarto.

## What I Learned

- How to build a website using Quarto
- How to create dashboards
- How Shiny apps work
- How Shinylive differs from Shiny
---
